product_overview: Multi-tenant SaaS core providing a universal POS + CRM platform with module-based extensions (billing, DIAN, inventory) and strict tenant isolation via Supabase RLS and JWT. Includes billing/subscriptions, MercadoPago payments integration, and admin tooling for module activation and audit logging.
core_goals: Provide a secure multi-tenant core (POS + CRM + Inventory) with strict RLS and server-side tenant resolution (tenant_id from JWT).
Support modular features that can be activated per-tenant (add-ons) and audited (billing_audit_logs, tenant_subscription_items).
Enable billing and subscription management (plan base + add-ons) and integrate MercadoPago for payments.
Prevent common security/consistency issues: no select('*'), Zod validation on inputs, strict TypeScript, tenant_id never from client.
Migrate heavy assets (inspection photos) from base64 storage to Supabase Storage to reduce DB usage.

features.name: Authentication & Multi-tenancy
features.description: Sign-in, onboarding and tenant resolution. Onboarding writes tenant_id into the user's JWT app_metadata and ensures RLS-protected access for subsequent requests.
user_flows: POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /onboarding with JWT and valid organization data -> Receive 200 and updated JWT containing app_metadata.tenant_id
POST /auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /onboarding without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token lacking tenant_id -> GET /api/profile with JWT -> Receive 200 profile; POST /onboarding with JWT and org data -> Receive 200 and updated JWT (tenant_id written via server admin update)

features.name: Customer Management (CRM)
features.description: Tenant-scoped CRUD for business customers (list, create, update, delete) with Zod validation and RLS ensuring tenants only see their customers.
user_flows: POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/customers with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with list of tenant customers
POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/customers with Authorization: Bearer <token> and valid customer payload -> Receive 201 Created with new customer id
POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/customers with Authorization: Bearer <token> and invalid payload (fails Zod) -> Receive 422 Validation error

features.name: Inventory & Products
features.description: Manage products and inventory stock levels per tenant: create products, adjust stock, and query inventory. All operations resolve tenant on server and validate inputs.
user_flows: POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/inventory/products with Authorization: Bearer <token> and valid product payload -> Receive 201 Created with product id

POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> PATCH /api/inventory/products/:id/stock with Authorization: Bearer <token> and {stock_delta: 5} -> Receive 200 with updated stock level

POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/inventory/products with Authorization: Bearer <token> and invalid payload (negative price or non-int price) -> Receive 422 Validation error

features.name: Billing & Subscriptions
features.description: Tenant billing summary (plan base + add-ons) and add-on activation flows with audit logs. Consumers read vw_tenant_billing_summary; SuperAdmin/manual flows call server actions that invoke DB functions activate_addon_for_tenant / can_activate_module_for_tenant.
user_flows: POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/billing/summary with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with tenant billing summary from vw_tenant_billing_summary

POST /auth/login as SuperAdmin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token containing super_admin role -> POST /api/billing/activate-addon with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {tenant_id, module_slug, price} -> Receive 200 with status MODULE_ACTIVATED or PRICE_CHANGED (server invokes activate_addon_for_tenant)

POST /auth/login as Admin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/billing/activate-addon with Authorization: Bearer <token> for module 'dian' when tenant plan is below professional -> Receive 400 with reason (can_activate_module_for_tenant validation failed)

features.name: Payments (MercadoPago Integration)
features.description: Create payment sessions for subscriptions and handle asynchronous webhook notifications to update tenant subscriptions and payments. Integration uses MercadoPago preferences and verifies webhook signatures.
user_flows: POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/payments/create-session with Authorization: Bearer <token> and {amount, description} -> Receive 200 with MercadoPago preference_id or checkout_url
POST /api/payments/webhook (MercadoPago) with valid signature -> Server verifies signature -> Receive 200 and update payment/subscription status in DB
POST /api/payments/webhook with invalid or missing signature -> Receive 401 Invalid signature and do not update DB

features.name: Inspection Photo Storage Migration
features.description: Replace base64-in-DB inspection photos with Supabase Storage objects and signed URLs to reduce DB size and storage costs. Provide migration endpoints/tools and on-upload endpoints that store directly to storage.
user_flows: POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/inspections/upload with Authorization: Bearer <token> and multipart/form-data image -> Receive 201 with storage URL and inspection id (image stored in Supabase Storage under /inspections)

POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/inspections/migrate with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {batch_size: 100} -> Receive 200 with {migrated_count} as server migrates base64 rows to Storage using a server-side job

POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/inspections/upload with Authorization: Bearer <token> and malformed multipart -> Receive 400 Bad Request (upload validation failed)

features.name: Authentication & Multi-tenancy
features.description: User auth with Supabase and secure multi-tenant isolation via RLS and JWT.

features.name: Inventory & Products
features.description: Management of products and inventory stock levels.

features.name: Billing & Subscriptions
features.description: Management of tenant plans and add-ons with audit logs.

known_limitations.issue: Images stored as base64 in some modules
